results.resolved_title: A Type IV Pilus Mediates DNA Binding during Natural Transformation in Streptococcus pneumoniae
results.note: Cited paper is about the pneumococcal transformation Type IV pilus (ComGC) in Streptococcus pneumoniae; makes no claim about Brucella abortus Bsp T4SS effectors. Wrong-paper provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: A Type IV Pilus Mediates DNA Binding during Natural Transformation in Streptococcus pneumoniae
results.note: S. pneumoniae transformation pilus paper; no mention of Brucella Bsp effectors.

results.resolved_title: Prophage WO genes recapitulate and enhance Wolbachia-induced cytoplasmic incompatibility
results.note: Full text discusses CifA (WD0631) extensively as a prophage-WO cytoplasmic-incompatibility factor; gives no evidence it is a T4SS-secreted substrate/effector. No secretion claim of any kind.

results.resolved_title: Prophage WO genes recapitulate and enhance Wolbachia-induced cytoplasmic incompatibility
results.note: CifB (WD0632) characterized as a CI factor; full text gives no T4SS secretion/effector evidence.

results.resolved_title: Prophage WO genes recapitulate and enhance Wolbachia-induced cytoplasmic incompatibility
results.note: Paper names only cifA/cifB (WD0631/WD0632); CidA nomenclature not used here. No T4SS secretion/effector evidence in retrieved full text.

results.resolved_title: Prophage WO genes recapitulate and enhance Wolbachia-induced cytoplasmic incompatibility
results.note: Paper names only cifA/cifB; CidB nomenclature not used. No T4SS secretion/effector evidence in retrieved full text.

results.resolved_title: The Burkholderia pseudomallei Proteins BapA and BapC Are Secreted TTSS3 Effectors and BapB Levels Modulate Expression of BopE
results.quote: These data strongly suggest that BapA and BapC are secreted in a TTSS3-dependent manner.
results.note: BPSS1528 BapA confirmed as TTSS3 (T3SS) secreted effector in B. pseudomallei K96243.

results.resolved_title: The Burkholderia pseudomallei Proteins BapA and BapC Are Secreted TTSS3 Effectors and BapB Levels Modulate Expression of BopE
results.note: TC-tagged BapB could not be detected in cultures or supernatant; paper concludes BapB acts as a regulator/chaperone of BopE production, NOT a secreted effector. Positive counter-evidence against secretion.

results.resolved_title: The Burkholderia pseudomallei Proteins BapA and BapC Are Secreted TTSS3 Effectors and BapB Levels Modulate Expression of BopE
results.quote: These data strongly suggest that BapA and BapC are secreted in a TTSS3-dependent manner.
results.note: BPSS1526 BapC identified as a novel TTSS3 (T3SS) secreted effector in B. pseudomallei K96243.

results.resolved_title: A novel EspA-associated surface organelle of enteropathogenic Escherichia coli involved in protein translocation into epithelial cells
results.quote: In EPEC, four proteins are known to be exported by a type III secretion system_EspA, EspB and EspD required for subversion of host cell signal transduction pathways
results.note: Abstract-only (PMC full text empty). Paper is on EPEC EspA, a type-III-secreted protein. O157:H7 Sakai ECs4555 is the closely related EHEC ortholog of the same A/E-pathogen EspA; cited paper establishes EspA's T3SS role.

results.resolved_title: A novel EspA-associated surface organelle of enteropathogenic Escherichia coli involved in protein translocation into epithelial cells
results.quote: In EPEC, four proteins are known to be exported by a type III secretion system_EspA, EspB and EspD required for subversion of host cell signal transduction pathways
results.note: Exact-match entry: EPEC E2348/69 EspA (E2348C_3936); cited paper is the EPEC EspA paper. SUPPORTED.

results.resolved_title: Identification of T6SS-dependent effector and immunity proteins by Tn-seq in Vibrio cholerae
results.quote: VgrG3 is a lysozyme-like T6SS effector and, like other effectors described in P. aeruginosa, likely targets the cell wall of bacterial prey for enzymatic digestion.
results.note: VgrG3 = VCA0123 (matches VC_A0123); named T6SS muramidase effector, immunity TsiV3. Quote from cited-paper full text (PMC3574944).

results.resolved_title: Identification of T6SS-dependent effector and immunity proteins by Tn-seq in Vibrio cholerae
results.quote: the antibacterial effect of TseL is dependent on its lipase domain
results.note: TseL = VC1418 (matches VC_1418); identified as a T6SS lipase effector, immunity TsiV1. Quote from cited-paper full text (PMC3574944).

results.resolved_title: Identification and Characterization of EvpQ, a Novel T6SS Effector Encoded on a Mobile Genetic Element in Edwardsiella piscicida
results.note: Cited paper is exclusively about EvpQ (ETAE_2037). EvpJ / ETAE_0977 (PAAR) is not mentioned anywhere in the full text. Wrong protein for this citation.

results.resolved_title: Identification and Characterization of EvpQ, a Novel T6SS Effector Encoded on a Mobile Genetic Element in Edwardsiella piscicida
results.quote: we have demonstrated that EvpQ is a T6SS effector that is translocated into eukaryotic host cells.
results.note: EvpQ = ETAE_2037, T6SS-dependent secretion and host-cell translocation in E. piscicida EIB202. SUPPORTED.

results.resolved_title: Genetic and biochemical characterization of PrtA, an RTX-like metalloprotease from Photorhabdus
results.quote: The prtA gene resides in a locus encoding both the protease ABC transporter (prtBCD) and an intervening ORF encoding a protease inhibitor (inh).
results.note: PrtA is an RTX alkaline zinc metalloprotease secreted via its dedicated ABC transporter (prtBCD) = Type I secretion, in Photorhabdus luminescens. Abstract via PubMed; full text paywalled. Cited 'prtA1' = the PrtA of this paper.

results.resolved_title: YspM, a newly identified Ysa type III secreted protein of Yersinia enterocolitica Biovar 1B
results.quote: These results indicate that YspM is secreted by the Ysa T3SS and that, possibly due to lipase activity, it targets eukaryotic cellular component(s).
results.note: Abstract via PMC (full text empty). YspM is a Ysa chromosomal T3SS secreted protein, translocated into host cells, in Y. enterocolitica 8081 (biovar 1B).

results.resolved_title: BipC, a Predicted Burkholderia pseudomallei Type 3 Secretion System Translocator Protein with Actin Binding Activity
results.quote: The Burkholderia BipC protein is homologous to the Salmonella SipC and Shigella IpaC T3SS proteins, and is secreted by the Bsa T3SS
results.note: BipC = BPSS1531, secreted by the Bsa (T3SS-3) system in B. pseudomallei K96243; translocator/effector with actin-binding activity.

results.resolved_title: (bioRxiv preprint 10.1101/868539 - not retrievable, 403)
results.quote: the product of the gene VCA0285 is likely a new peptidoglycan hydrolase that is secreted by T6SS
results.note: Cited bioRxiv DOI 10.1101/868539 returned 403 (could not retrieve). TseH = VCA0285 confirmed as a V. cholerae T6SS-secreted effector via external reference Altindis et al. mBio 2015, doi:10.1128/mBio.00075-15 (PMID 25759499).

results.resolved_title: External loops at the C terminus of Erwinia chrysanthemi pectate lyase C are required for species-specific secretion through the Out type II pathway
results.quote: The plant pathogens Erwinia chrysanthemi and Erwinia carotovora secrete several isozymes of pectate lyase (Pel) by the out-encoded type II pathway.
results.note: Abstract via PMC (full text empty). PelC secreted via the Out type II pathway (T2SS) in Erwinia chrysanthemi = Dickeya dadantii 3937. SUPPORTED.

results.resolved_title: XIAP Regulates Cytosol-Specific Innate Immunity to Listeria Infection
results.note: Cited paper is about host XIAP and innate immunity to Listeria monocytogenes; nothing about Anaplasma phagocytophilum AnkA or any T4SS effector. Wrong-paper provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: The innate immune response in human tuberculosis
results.note: Cited paper is a review of innate immunity to Mycobacterium tuberculosis; no mention of Legionella pneumophila LegA9 or a Dot/Icm T4SS effector. Wrong-paper provenance defect.

results.resolved_title: Legionella pneumophila regulates the small GTPase Rab1 activity by reversible phosphorylcholination
results.quote: the activity of AnkX is regulated by the Dot/Icm substrate Lpg0696 (Lem3), which functions as a dephosphorylcholinase to reverse AnkX-mediated modification on Rab1.
results.note: Lem3 = lpg0696, named a Dot/Icm (T4SS) substrate of Legionella pneumophila. Abstract via PMC (full text empty). SUPPORTED.

results.resolved_title: Genetic Analysis of Anti-Amoebae and Anti-Bacterial Activities of the Type VI Secretion System in Vibrio cholerae
results.quote: VCA0118, which is not required for Hcp expression or secretion but still plays a role in both amoebae and bacterial killing and may therefore be an effector protein.
results.note: EFF00004 = VCA0118 in V. cholerae V52, classified as a putative T6SS effector. Quote from cited-paper full text. (organism/sys_instance_id blank in batch; paper organism is V. cholerae O37 V52.)

results.resolved_title: (10.1099/mic.0.000186 - publisher page 403, no PMID/PMCID, not retrievable)
results.note: DOI has no PMID/PMCID; microbiologyresearch.org full text returns 403 and no abstract retrievable. Could not confirm HGE-14 (APH_0625) as an A. phagocytophilum T4SS effector from the cited paper. Absence from un-retrievable text = INACCESSIBLE.

results.resolved_title: The bcpAIOB Genes Define Unique Classes of Two-Partner Secretion and Contact Dependent Growth Inhibition Systems
results.quote: They export large exoproteins (TpsA family members such as CdiA) across the outer membrane using pore-forming beta-barrel proteins (TpsB family members such as CdiB).
results.note: BcpA is the TpsA-family secreted exoprotein of the bcpAIOB two-partner-secretion (Type Vb / T5SS) CDI system in Burkholderia thailandensis E264; BcpB is the cognate TpsB pore. Full text confirms BcpA export/cell-surface role.
